tools.name: doodle
tools.description: Use to allow the user to draw something and show it to the model. Opens a drawing widget inside the conversation when the user should communicate visually by sketching, handwriting, annotating, or freehand drawing. The widget provides a canvas, uploads the final drawing to a ChatGPT-hosted file when the user presses Done, and exposes that file to the model through widget state after the drawing is finished.
